title: Han Solo and the Princess
content:
{{Top|music}} {{Otheruses|Han}} {{Update|{{YouTube|video=gUuLnzQpXb0|text=Han Solo and the Princess 2018 Concert Version|channel=channel/UCd8zDuJE4DE68ZE5eyWcozA|name=Fal|archivedate=20201122185538}}}} {{Music |image=[[File:Han_solo_and_the_princess.png]] |title="Han Solo and the Princess" |composer=[[John Williams]] |written=[[1980]] |recorded= |release date=*1980 *[[2015]][[Star Wars: The Force Awakens (soundtrack)|''Star Wars: The Force Awakens'' soundtrack]] *[[2018]] {{C|concert arrangement}}{{YouTube|video=gUuLnzQpXb0|text=Han Solo and the Princess 2018 Concert Version|channel=channel/UCd8zDuJE4DE68ZE5eyWcozA|name=Fal|quote=From Film Night May 2018
Composed and Conducted by John Williams|archivedate=20201122185538}}{{YouTube|video=YK5Tb9okZus|text=New Han Solo and the Princess Williams RAH LSO 2018|channel=channel/UCQiUuDuB-f-KscayofY4-Ew|name=Wael Binali|quote=Beautiful new version of Han Solo and the Princess, with the LSO conducted by Brossé at the Royal Albert Hall on October 26, 2018|archivedate=20211007210915}} *[[2019]]{{YouTube|video=WWem0wXiSSY|text=Han Solo and the Princess (From "Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back")|channel=channel/UCvCU7oYOibpToaqAX4Nu6qQ|name=Robert Ziegler - Topic|archiveurl=https://archive.is/qFAxa}} *[[2020]]{{WebCite|url=https://www.musiconvinyl.com/catalog/robert-ziegler/music-from-the-star-wars-saga-the-essential-collection#.YWCD9drMLb0|text=OST (ROBERT ZIEGLER) - MUSIC FROM THE STAR WARS SAGA - THE ESSENTIAL COLLECTION - Music On Vinyl|archivedate=20210427204017}} |represents=Love between [[Han Solo]] and [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]] |performedby=[[London Symphony Orchestra]] |genre=Film score |length= |key=G major / B minor |tempo= 𝅘𝅥 = 80 |texture= |timesig=4/4 |meter= |mode= |lyrics= |soundtracks= |movies=[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|V]], [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|VI]], [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|VII]], [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|VIII]], [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|IX]] |EU= |canon=*''[[LEGO Star Wars Summer Vacation|Summer Vacation]]'' |media={{Audio|Han Solo and the Princess.flac|"Han Solo and the Princess"}} }} '''Han Solo and the Princess''' is a musical theme composed by [[John Williams]] and played by the [[London Symphony Orchestra]] for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. It is the love theme of [[Han Solo]] and [[Princess]] [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]], most prominently played during those characters' romantic encounter aboard the ''[[Millennium Falcon]]'' in the belly of the [[Exogorth|space slug]]. It is reused in a more dramatic manner as Solo is frozen in [[carbonite]] in [[Cloud City]]. It is played in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] when Leia reveals herself to Han after freeing him from the carbonite in [[Boba Fett's Palace|Jabba's Palace]], and also immediately following the destruction of the [[DS-2 Death Star II Mobile Battle Station|second Death Star]], when Leia reveals to Han that [[Luke Skywalker]] is her brother, effectively ending whatever competition Han thought may still have existed between the two for Leia's affections. The love theme is considered a complementary expansion of ''[[Princess Leia's Theme]]'', the theme of Princess Leia, first heard in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], and also begins on a major sixth. Whereas ''Princess Leia's Theme'' represents a pure innocence of the Princess, ''Han Solo and the Princess'' trades in this innocence for a new element of maturity in her personal character. In ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'', the theme is played when playing as Han Solo. The [[December 18]], [[2015]]{{SW|url=news/the-star-wars-the-force-awakens-soundtrack-arrives-december-18|text=The ''Star Wars: The Force Awakens'' Soundtrack Arrives December 18}} [[Star Wars: The Force Awakens (soundtrack)|soundtrack]] to the 2015 [[sequel trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']], contains the track "Han and Leia," which includes themes from past films, including "[[The Force Theme]]" and "[[Princess Leia's Theme]]" from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], as well as "Han Solo and the Princess." It also includes lighter versions of tracks from ''The Force Awakens'', including "[[March of the Resistance]]" and [[Ben Solo's theme|Kylo Ren's theme]]. It first plays when Han and Leia see one another on [[Takodana]] for the first time in many [[Standard year|years]], and continues into the [[Resistance]] [[Resistance base|base]] on [[D'Qar]]. The theme is also played as Leia and [[Rey Skywalker|Rey]] sadly embrace upon the Resistance's return from [[Starkiller Base]], where Han was murdered by his and Leia's [[Ben Solo|own son]].{{Film|VII}} It returns briefly in [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''The Last Jedi'']] when Luke hands Han's golden dice to Leia on [[Crait]]. The theme is present in [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''The Rise of Skywalker'']] when Leia senses the final battle between [[Ben Solo|Kylo Ren]] and Rey. The [[December 18]], [[2015]]{{SW|url=news/the-star-wars-the-force-awakens-soundtrack-arrives-december-18|text=The ''Star Wars: The Force Awakens'' Soundtrack Arrives December 18}} [[Star Wars: The Force Awakens (soundtrack)|soundtrack]] to the 2015 [[sequel trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']], contains the track "Han and Leia," which includes themes from past films, including "[[The Force Theme]]" and "[[Princess Leia's Theme]]" from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], as well as "Han Solo and the Princess." It also includes lighter versions of tracks from ''The Force Awakens'', including "[[March of the Resistance]]" and [[Ben Solo's theme|Kylo Ren's theme]]. It is used in the film's movie trailer and It first plays when Han and Leia see one another on [[Takodana]] for the first time in many [[Standard year|years]], and continues into the [[Resistance]] [[Resistance base|base]] on [[D'Qar]]. The theme is also played as Leia and [[Rey Skywalker|Rey]] sadly embrace upon the Resistance's return from [[Starkiller Base]], where Han was murdered by his and Leia's [[Ben Solo|own son]].{{Film|VII}} It returns briefly in [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''The Last Jedi'']] when Luke hands Han's golden dice to Leia on [[Crait]]. The theme is present in [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''The Rise of Skywalker'']] when Leia senses the final battle between [[Ben Solo|Kylo Ren]] and Rey. ==Sources== {{IncompleteList|oou=1}} *{{Film|V}} *''[[Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back Original Soundtrack]]'' *''[[Once Upon a Galaxy: A Journal of the Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]'' *[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] *''[[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{WebCite|url=https://lso.co.uk/whats-on/icalrepeat.detail/2018/10/26/1393/-/a-celebration-of-john-williams.html|text=London Symphony Orchestra - A Celebration of John Williams|author=[[London Symphony Orchestra]]|archivedate=20211007211117}} *{{WebCite|url=https://www.musiconvinyl.com/catalog/robert-ziegler/music-from-the-star-wars-saga-the-essential-collection#.YWCD9drMLb0|text=OST (ROBERT ZIEGLER) - MUSIC FROM THE STAR WARS SAGA - THE ESSENTIAL COLLECTION - Music On Vinyl|archivedate=20210427204017}} {{Themes|saga=1}} {{RWM}} {{Interlang |ka=Han Solo and the Princess }} [[Category:Themes and leitmotifs]]
